Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: avoid tower-http not_found_service for SPA fallback

tower-http 0.6's ServeDir::not_found_service() always overrides the
response status to 404 regardless of what the fallback service returns.
This broke OIDC login because the callback URL returned 404.

Instead, wrap ServeDir in a custom service_fn that intercepts 404
responses and returns index.html with explicit 200 status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: properly fix text field focus with KeyableWindow + activation policy

Three changes to solve the MenuBarExtra key window conflict:

1. KeyableWindow subclass overrides canBecomeKey/canBecomeMain to
   guarantee the window can accept keyboard focus regardless of
   what the MenuBarExtra panel does internally.

2. NSApp.setActivationPolicy(.regular) ensures the app transitions
   from accessory (menu bar) to regular mode so windows can become
   key and main.

3. asyncAfter(0.15s) replaces async (which was zero-delay and still
   in the same run loop) to give the MenuBarExtra panel time to
   fully tear down before the new window claims key status.

commit.message:
Fix KeyError, backtest trade logs, sectors, and SPY chart

- _deal_next_hand: guard against sim_date missing from prices index
  (date might be absent if all closes were NaN during upsert); fall
  back to nearest available trading day at or before the target date

- show_proposals_dialog: remove @st.dialog decorator and render inline
  (full-page with early return in main).  @st.dialog was silently
  swallowing the db writes in backtest mode, leaving trade logs and
  position history empty

- render_market_data backtest: enrich symbol rows with name/sector by
  joining against the simulation DB's sp500_stocks table instead of
  hardcoding '—' for every row

- _render_vs_sp500: normalise SPY from Day 1 (first simulation date)
  rather than from the artificial t0 anchor.  This fixes the chart
  showing S&P 500 as already down at the start of a new simulation.

commit.message:
api: ajouter database-update.sql pour les tables Stripe manquantes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix hex formation: place Alpha drones at 6 vertices, Beta at center

hex_positions() was returning center + 5 vertices (n=6 default),
causing Alpha_0 to overlap Beta_0 at the formation center. Added
include_center parameter; callers now use include_center=False to
get all 6 hexagon vertex positions for the Alpha regiment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: require ≥2 real columns to accept a row as header

The previous fix scanned forward past all-__EMPTY rows, but stopped as soon as
any non-__EMPTY key appeared. Files with TWO title rows (e.g. the same merged
title on rows 0 and 1) fooled the check: row 0 has "לוז שר..." (1 real column)
which satisfied some(k => !startsWith('__EMPTY')), so scanning stopped there.

Changed the condition to require at least 2 named columns before accepting a row
as the real header — a title/merged row can only produce 0–1 real column name,
whereas a genuine header row always has ≥2 fields (title + start_date at minimum).

fix: show event details dialog first with Google Maps link

Previously, clicking an event with a uid would skip the details dialog
and go directly to the edit form. This meant the Google Maps link for
the location was never shown. Now clicking any event shows the details
dialog first (with clickable Maps link, calendar, description) and
users can click Edit/Delete buttons from there to modify the event.

commit.message:
Fix OOM: lazy-load dataset using byte offsets instead of loading all chunks into RAM

Loading 6M chunks as tensors eagerly consumed ~96GB RAM, killing the process before
GPU training could start. Now indexes byte offsets at startup (~48MB) and reads
each chunk on demand, keeping memory constant regardless of dataset size.

commit.message:
feat: skill-lifecycle 최종 요약 리포트 개선

변경사항:
- 파일 변경 추적 강화 (생성/수정/삭제/개선 분류)
- 변경사항별 근거(Evidence)와 이유(Reasoning) 추가
- 기대효과(Before→After) 명시로 개선 투명성 강화

상세 내용:
1. 파일 변경 세부 정보
   - Created Files: 새로 생성된 파일 목록
   - Modified Files: 수정된 파일 목록
   - Deleted Files: 삭제된 파일 목록
   - Auto-Improved: 자동 개선 적용 내역

2. 변경 근거 및 이유 (REASONING & EVIDENCE)
   - Evidence: 무엇을 발견했는지
   - Reason: 왜 이 변경이 필요한지
   - 예: test_cases.json 생성 → Evidence: 검증 파일 누락
                        → Reason: 테스트 케이스로 스킬 동작 검증

3. 기대효과 (EXPECTED OUTCOMES)
   - Before: 초기 Pass Rate (예: 75%)
   - After: 최종 Pass Rate (예: 100%)
   - Delta: 개선 폭 (+25%)
   - Expected Behavior: 개선 후 기대되는 동작

출력 예시:
```
📝 FILE CHANGES (Detailed):
  📁 Created Files (2):
     1. Created: test_cases.json
     2. Created: references/README.md

💡 REASONING & EVIDENCE:
  1. Change: Created 2 file(s)
     Evidence: test_cases.json or references/ were missing
     Reason: Test cases validate skill behavior

📊 EXPECTED OUTCOMES (Before → After):
  Pass Rate:
     Before: 75.0%
     After:  100.0%
     Delta:  +25.0% ✅
```

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
